scenes.title: 重生后的噩梦 (Nightmare of Rebirth)
scenes.raw_text: 张若尘大吼一声，想向前一扑，压得鎏金铸造的床榻“咯吱”一声，猛然坐了起来。发现只是一个梦，张若尘才长长吐出一口气...
scenes.visual_prompt: Cinematic shot of a pale young man waking up gasping in a golden bed, ancient Chinese palace interior, dim moonlight filtered through silk curtains, sweat on his forehead.
scenes.camera_movement: PUSH IN to CLOSE UP on Zhang Ruochen's face.
scenes.action_description: Zhang Ruochen wakes up from a deep nightmare, sitting up abruptly.

scenes.title: 林妃的关怀 (Lin Fei's Concern)
scenes.raw_text: 一个身体柔弱的宫装美妇人，从外面推门走进来...尘儿，你又做噩梦了？眼前这个美妇人，是云武郡王的王妃，也是张若尘的娘亲，林妃。
scenes.visual_prompt: A gentle woman in elegant red-hooded mink fur cloak entering a dimly lit ancient room, holding a lantern, worried expression.
scenes.action_description: Lin Fei enters the room and sits by the bed, touching Zhang Ruochen's forehead.

appearance.clothing: red mink fur cloak, elegant palace dress
appearance.hair: neatly tied hair with simple jade pin

scenes.title: 八王子的欺凌 (8th Prince's Bullying)
scenes.raw_text: 八王子穿着一身金缕衣，腰上缠着一根玉石带...一个奴婢也敢挡本王子的路，真是找死。
scenes.visual_prompt: An arrogant young man in golden embroidered robes and jade belt, followed by muscular armored guards, pushing past a maid in a courtyard.
scenes.camera_movement: LOW ANGLE following the 8th Prince's stride.
scenes.action_description: The 8th Prince invades the palace, arrogantly demanding Zhang Ruochen and his mother leave.

scenes.title: 雪夜搬迁 (Move in the Snowy Night)
scenes.raw_text: 林妃和参扶着张若尘，一步步走出玉漱宫...夜以深，寒风萧瑟。坐在冰冷的石凳上面，张若尘瘦弱的身上裹着一件外衣...
scenes.visual_prompt: A weak young man supported by his mother, walking away from a grand palace into the dark snowy night, cold wind blowing snow.
scenes.camera_movement: LONG SHOT, high contrast between the lit palace and the dark snowy path.
scenes.action_description: Zhang Ruochen and Lin Fei leave their home, carrying minimal belongings into the cold.
